curriculumVittae.title: Curriculum Vitae
curriculumVittae.pdf: Curriculum Vitae PDF (in Lattes format - http://lattes.cnpq.br)
curriculumVittae.xml: Curriculum Vitae XML in Lattes format (not including means having no publications to be counted in the selection)

provaAnterior.title: Previous Selection Exam Score
provaAnterior.description: If you wish to use the score from a PPGI selection exam from a previous year (maximum of 2 years), please upload the PDF of the exam through the option below

validation.conjuntoPreenchido: Fill the set (Course:, Institution:, Year of Graduation:) and Type: together or leave all blank.
